custom_nodes.author: crom8505
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Dynamic-Sigmas
custom_nodes.description: Custom sigma scheduler node for ComfyUI. Easily tune, visualize, and concatenate dynamic sigma curves with an interactive graph.

custom_nodes.author: ketle-man
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI VRM Pose Editor 3D
custom_nodes.description: Interactive 3D pose editor inside ComfyUI. Load VRM/GLB/GLTF models, drag bones to pose, control shape keys/expressions, and capture as IMAGE. All Three.js dependencies are bundled locally (no CDN required).

custom_nodes.author: krishnancr
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Pulse MeshAudit
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node for auditing 3D mesh files by rendering them with a headless renderer and displaying an interactive carousel of renders with detailed mesh statistics. Features 16 renders per execution (4 camera angles x 4 shading modes), an interactive image viewer, and an asset statistics panel with geometry and quality metrics. Supports Linux x64 and Windows x64 with Vulkan-capable GPUs.

custom_nodes.author: MVNT
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-MVNT
custom_nodes.description: AI dance choreography from music. Generate full-body dance motion (BVH/FBX/JSON) from any audio track using MVNT's diffusion model trained with 100+ professional choreographers. Create rigged 3D characters from images, preview motion as stick-figure animations, and export photorealistic AI music videos — all inside ComfyUI. Nodes: MVNT Generate Dance, MVNT Generate Character, MVNT Export Video, MVNT Preview BVH, MVNT List Styles, MVNT Estimate Cost, MVNT Load Motion.

custom_nodes.author: vegaflowltd
custom_nodes.title: Vega Flow V8.9 — Temporal Stabilisation
custom_nodes.description: Professional temporal stabilisation engine. Eliminates flicker, luminance drift, and frame-to-frame inconsistency in AI-generated and traditional video footage.

custom_nodes.author: yhryzy
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-VULCA
custom_nodes.description: Cultural art evaluation nodes — L1-L5 scoring across 13 traditions, Layered Generation + Inpainting, Brief-driven creative workflows. Evaluate AI-generated art for cultural accuracy and get actionable improvement suggestions. Requires: pip install vulca

custom_nodes.author: alisson-anjos
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-BFSNodes
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI Custom Nodes including FrameRangedFaceLoader for consistent face editing and framing

custom_nodes.author: jeremieLouvaert
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-prompt-assembler
custom_nodes.description: Modular prompt assembly nodes for ComfyUI — 8-slot, compact 4-slot, and weighted 6-slot with attention syntax

custom_nodes.author: Stibo
custom_nodes.title: Nifty Nodes for ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description: Utility nodes for ComfyUI: logic switches, bundle nodes, selectors, bypass nodes, image/latent utilities, and workflow automation nodes.

custom_nodes.author: HalfikCode
custom_nodes.title: Prompt DB
custom_nodes.description: A powerful prompt management system for ComfyUI. Store, categorize, search, and combine prompts with full LoRA integration — all from a beautiful built-in web UI.

custom_nodes.author: jeremieLouvaert
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Prompt-Vault
custom_nodes.description: Photographic prompt arsenal — curated templates and component builder with real camera gear, lighting, film stocks

custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Flux2Klein-Conditioning-Toolkit
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI nodes for FLUX.2 Klein conditioning: region-aware text enhancement, sectioned prompt encoding, and corrected reference-latent mixing with multi-reference support.

custom_nodes.description: NVIDIA RTX Deblur & Denoise Nodes for ComfyUI\nThis extension provides GPU-accelerated deblur and denoise nodes powered by NVIDIA RTX technology via the nvvfx SDK.

custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI Qwen 3.5 Prompting nodes (captionate image, improve prompt, etc)

custom_nodes.description: Compose prompts from multiple toggleable text slots. Combine enabled entries or select one. Dynamic slot visibility with up to 10 text slots in a single node.

custom_nodes.author: TakkunRed
custom_nodes.title: comfyui_checkpoint_preset_manager
custom_nodes.description: A custom node for ComfyUI designed to manage and automate optimal settings for different Checkpoints. It allows you to save and recall specific parameters—including steps, CFG, samplers, schedulers, and resolutions—linked directly to the model name.

custom_nodes.author: Jimpi
custom_nodes.title: WorkflowUIPlugin
custom_nodes.description: This plugin adds features in order to enable full functionality of WorkflowUI Application to which turns your workflows into apps and provides structures for organizing your generations.

custom_nodes.author: cowneko
custom_nodes.title: CWK Prompt Composer
custom_nodes.description: A visual pill-based prompt composer node for ComfyUI. Features 4 prompt panels (Quality, Main, Aesthetic, Negative), tag browser, drag-to-reorder pills, weight control, presets, Lucky prompt generator, manual override mode, and wildcard (.yaml) file loader.

custom_nodes.author: jeankassio
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-AceStep_SFT
custom_nodes.description: An all-in-one node for ComfyUI that implements AceStep 1.5 SFT (Supervised Fine-Tuning), a high-quality music generation model. This node replicates the full functionality of the official Gradio pipeline, offering fine control over audio synthesis parameters.

custom_nodes.author: dogodg3838

custom_nodes.description: Lightweight NVIDIA hardware monitor for ComfyUI. No node conflicts, pure display widget.

custom_nodes.description: Architecture-aware LoRA loader for FLUX.2 Klein in ComfyUI with automatic per-layer strength calibration.

custom_nodes.description: HSL-based color consistency node for ComfyUI. Supports independent matching of Luminance, Hue, and Saturation with mask protection and bilingual UI.

custom_nodes.description: Bypass or mute entire node groups with a single click. Includes a Block Bypass Switch node, Group Bypass right-click menu, and a floating Group Bypass Panel.

custom_nodes.author: augment-lib
custom_nodes.title: upscale-pro
custom_nodes.description: ✨ Augment Upscale — Logo and image upscaler for ComfyUI. Upscale logos, icons, and brand assets to high resolution with sharp, clean results. A professional alternative to Magnific AI built directly into your ComfyUI workflow. Supports 2x upscaling via the Augment Studio API with automatic job polling and tensor output. Ideal for logo design, brand asset pipelines, print-ready artwork, and any workflow that needs crisp detail-preserving enlargement. Includes built-in flow control trigger and wait nodes for chaining multi-step pipelines. Get your API key at [a/augmentstudio.app/pricing](https://augmentstudio.app/pricing)

custom_nodes.author: xmarre
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Spectrum-Qwen-Proper
custom_nodes.description: Spectrum-style hidden-state forecasting patcher for native ComfyUI Qwen Image-family models.

custom_nodes.author: PBandDev
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-ping
custom_nodes.description: Browser-played workflow success and failure audio notifications for ComfyUI

custom_nodes.author: playboy-dongan
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-pose-redirect-align
custom_nodes.description: Align one pose image to another by matching subject scale and head position for ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: Carasibana
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-SimpleFloatSlider
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom nodes providing styled draggable float slider widgets

custom_nodes.author: Carasibana
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-ResizeToCanvasSize
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node pack that resizes images to an exact target canvas size with full control over scaling, cropping, and placement.

custom_nodes.author: Stable Diffusion VN
custom_nodes.title: SDVN Segment Anything
custom_nodes.description: A set of nodes developed from the original Segment Anything set, to streamline and fix new library conflicts

custom_nodes.author: huchukato
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-RIFE-TensorRT-Auto
custom_nodes.description: Ultra fast frame interpolation using Rife TensorRT with fully automatic installation and optimization. Features automatic TensorRT engine building, CUDA toolkit detection, and resolution profiles for optimal performance. 2-4x faster than original RIFE implementation with enhanced stability and memory management.

custom_nodes.author: huchukato
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Upscaler-TensorRT-Auto
custom_nodes.description: 2-4x faster ComfyUI image upscaling using TensorRT with automatic installation and model optimization. Supports popular upscaling models with automatic TensorRT engine building, CUDA toolkit detection, and memory-efficient processing. Enhanced performance and stability over original implementation.

custom_nodes.author: huchukato
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-HuggingFace
custom_nodes.description: HuggingFace model downloader for ComfyUI with advanced search and intelligent download system. Search, browse, and download models directly from HuggingFace repository without leaving ComfyUI interface. Features API token support, model type filtering, and migration path from Civicomfy with enhanced stability.

custom_nodes.author: nestflow
custom_nodes.title: Booru Taggers for ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description: An improved and extended node of various Booru taggers (WD taggers, Pixai, Camie, etc.)

custom_nodes.author: senjinthedragon
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Gender Tag Filter
custom_nodes.description: Filters and rewrites gendered vocabulary in Danbooru tags and natural language prompts to fix female-biased output from models like TIPO.

custom_nodes.author: ketle-man
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI 2D Pose Editor
custom_nodes.description: Interactive 2D rigging pose editor embedded inside a ComfyUI node. Drag joints to pose a figure, control eye direction, and export as IMAGE.

custom_nodes.author: Rimor-dev
custom_nodes.title: Diana - Interactive Assistant
custom_nodes.description: 🧝 Interactive assistant that lives in your ComfyUI workspace. Reacts to queue events with animated sprites, voice lines, and text bubbles. Features multiple personalities: Diana (calm), Kitty (cute), Kerrigan (dark). Includes audio toggle, idle timer, and smart error detection.

custom_nodes.author: tardigrade1001
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-mistral-caption
custom_nodes.description: A custom ComfyUI node that allows interaction with Mistral AI language and vision models directly inside a ComfyUI workflow.

custom_nodes.author: tardigrade1001
custom_nodes.title: send-to-comfyui
custom_nodes.description: A lightweight browser extension + custom ComfyUI node that creates a seamless Web → ComfyUI pipeline for sending images directly from the browser into your workflows.

custom_nodes.author: BISAM20
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-ACES-IO
custom_nodes.description: Professional OpenColorIO / ACES color-management nodes for ComfyUI. Mirrors Nuke's OCIO node set with ACES 2.0, 1.3, and 1.2 support, EXR sequence loading, animated preview, and video export (MP4, WebP, GIF).

custom_nodes.author: Dangocan
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI GLM-OCR
custom_nodes.description: Load and run GLM-OCR (zai-org/GLM-OCR) locally in ComfyUI. Supports text recognition, formula recognition, table extraction, and general image description. Picks up models from any ComfyUI checkpoint directory.

custom_nodes.author: George Jiang
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Save Image Without Metadata
custom_nodes.description: Save images without embedding workflow or prompt metadata

custom_nodes.author: cuzelac
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-CLAHE-Preprocessor
custom_nodes.description: CLAHE preprocessing node for improving 3D mesh generation with TRELLIS

custom_nodes.author: xmarre
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-StableManifoldCompander
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom nodes for correcting FLUX.2 high-resolution drift, washout, and crop reintegration artifacts with anchor-guided and affine companding workflows

custom_nodes.author: Premik
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-ImgPatchEditor
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI node for patching images using a difference detection algorithm. It detects changes between two images (original and patched), creates a mask of the differences, and merges them back together with configurable blending.

custom_nodes.author: xmarre
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-ScaleLockedResidualDiffusion
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node pack implementing Scale-Locked Residual Diffusion for high-resolution composition and anatomy stability.

custom_nodes.author: Rimor-dev
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-any_alarm
custom_nodes.description: A universal signal notifier node for ComfyUI that plays configurable sounds (voice modes, custom audio) whenever it receives any signal such as image, latent, or conditioning. (Description by CC)
